output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?song ?country WHERE {
  wd:Q197520 wdt:P361 ?episode .
  ?episode wdt:P361 ?performance .
  ?performance wdt:P919 ?song .
  ?performance wdt:P2805 ?score .
  ?song wdt:P495 ?country .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?score)
LIMIT 1
